title: Wetlands as Natural E-Waste Filters
description: A conceptual diagram illustrating the role of wetland ecosystems in mitigating the environmental impact of e-waste contaminants.
elements: Toxic Heavy Metals (e.g., Pb, Hg, Cd)
relationships: E-Waste Sources release Toxic Heavy Metals into Water Flow
Water Flow carries contaminants into Wetland Components
Wetland Components filter and absorb toxins via Plants and Microbes
Filtered Water Output is cleaner and less harmful to the environment
